name: LITERAL_ALL_LABELS_PRODUCTIVE
finding: 179 labels include internal wrappers, heuristics, lexicalized families, duplicates, umbrellas, and misanalyses.
standards_preserving_resolution: Use terminal-state contract: productive language subtypes promote; other labels become bounded internal/lexicalized or retire.

name: OVERBROAD_RUNTIME_LABELS
finding: The first broad demonstrative-classifier label has now been decomposed in the v0.5.183 render candidate; many other broad labels remain.
standards_preserving_resolution: Split exact language claims; retire or preserve broad names only as non-licensing compatibility aliases.
user_action: No authorization needed under autonomous governance.

name: EXACT_NATURAL_ATTESTATION
finding: Five manually adjudicated exact overt-head D-C-N attestations are preserved across five HKCanCor recording files/participant records, with three classifiers, multiple noun classes, and proximal/distal forms.
standards_preserving_resolution: Exact utterances, token records, contexts, participant metadata, source hashes, independence, and limitations recorded in the DEMO01 attestation adjudication.

name: PROSPECTIVE_HELDOUT_CUSTODY
finding: An independent evaluator returned a sealed archive whose raw SHA-256 matches the user-supplied checksum. The archive remains unopened.
standards_preserving_resolution: An independent evaluator creates, hashes, seals, and later scores unseen exact-family cases outside the recovery tree.
user_action: No further custody action. Do not open the archive; return render diagnostics first.

name: OBSIDIAN_RENDER_REVIEW
finding: The v0.5.183 DEMO01 render candidate now exists and passes visible, provenance, and inherited regression gates.
standards_preserving_resolution: Install the candidate package, render the locked review note, and return the completed review/diagnostics.
user_action: Install v0.5.183, render CANTO-SPAN-v0.5.183-RENDER-REVIEW.md in Obsidian, and return acceptance-summary plus full-diagnostics JSON.

name: NATIVE_CONFLICT
finding: Some families have recorded native/published conflicts. One speaker cannot settle dialect-wide distribution or internal analysis.
standards_preserving_resolution: Issue a blinded minimal-contrast packet and collect multiple independent speakers with region/register metadata only when the exact target is conflicted.
user_action: No action for the current demonstrative target.

name: VALENCY_UMBRELLA
finding: Current lexical tags and ProductiveVO/TransitiveVP/IntransitiveVP mix lexeme affordance, use-specific valency, complement type, discourse omission, and parser grouping.
standards_preserving_resolution: Replace public umbrellas with source-backed construction-specific selection and a non-licensing internal valency registry.
user_action: No authorization needed; implementation must use isolated packets.

name: NOMINAL_DEPENDENCIES
finding: Unknown compounds, incomplete NP assembly, coordination, and attachment ambiguity can make a correct higher construction appear complete or hide a wrong span.
standards_preserving_resolution: Promote narrow nominal subtypes first; keep lexicon, coordination, and attachment changes in separate packages.

name: SOURCE_ACCESS_AND_EXACT_LOCATORS
finding: Some authoritative examples or corpora may be unavailable, non-verbatim, or insufficiently locatable.
standards_preserving_resolution: Prefer accessible primary papers and spoken corpora; quarantine claims rather than substitute weak evidence.
user_action: Provide an owned scan or lawful access only when a named source is specifically requested.
